module.name: sticky
module.description: A sticky-note memo you place and size yourself in Edit layout (move + resize freely). Tilt with the rotate argument.
module.aiSpec: Use for a sticky-note memo / annotation placed on a slide (a casual aside, reminder, or callout). Position and size come from x/y/w/h args (percent of the slide); `rotate` tilts the note. Block module: the body is the note's content (markdown); an optional `title` arg adds a heading. Example: `<!-- @sticky title: Memo, x: 76, y: 30, w: 28, h: 22, rotate: 3 -->\nFix these figures!\n<!-- @end -->`

param.name: title
param.label: Title
param.desc: Heading shown at the top of the note (optional)

param.name: titlecolor
param.label: Title Color
param.desc: Title text colour (defaults to the note text colour)

param.name: rotate
param.label: Rotation
param.desc: Tilt of the note in degrees

snippet.label: Sticky Note
snippet.text: <!-- @sticky title: Memo, x: 76, y: 30, w: 28, h: 22, rotate: 3 --> Please update these figures by the meeting next week! <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A sticky note-style memo, pre-placed top-right. Move/resize it in Edit layout.
